data.title: Ripple president predicts 50% of Fortune 500 will adopt crypto by 2026, with global digital assets reaching $1 trillion.
data.description: Monica Long, president of Ripple, stated that blockchain technology is increasingly becoming the primary framework for modern finance. Long predicted that global balance sheets will soon encompass a staggering $1 trillion in digital assets. This suggests a significant shift towards digital assets as essential components of the global financial landscape, highlighting the growing importance of blockchain in the financial sector according to Long.

data.title: $1.8B worth liquidated in 48hrs as Bitcoin wipes out 2026 gains, dropping below $88,000. Crypto markets drop $225B due to trade and bond issues.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin plummeted below $88,000, resulting in the erasure of its monthly gains. This decline took place amidst a larger downturn in the cryptocurrency markets, with a total loss of $225 billion. Analysts are attributing this crash to a “sell America” trade strategy and issues in the Japanese bond market.

Qwen Hits 1B Downloads Alibaba Group’s Qwen AI models reached 1 billion downloads on Hugging Face, averaging 1.1 million per day, according to the latest data. Qwen has overtaken Meta Platforms Inc.’s Llama to rank as the world’s most downloaded open-source AI model.

data.title: Ant Group upgrades AI health service AQ's PC platform with DeepSearch for evidence-based clinical decision support, available free to clinicians.
data.description: Ant Group, based in Hangzhou, China, unveiled a significant enhancement to its AI-native health assistant, AQ, on its PC platform. The upgrade introduces DeepSearch for clinicians, a feature aimed at aiding evidence-based clinical decision-making. This service is accessible at no cost to clinicians and medical students. AQ's PC platform offers two primary functions: Health Q&A and DeepSearch. It facilitates medical literature searches, clinical practice, and research. This initiative underscores Ant Group's commitment to supporting healthcare professionals in their decision-making processes.

data.title: Major stock markets experience significant decline amid escalating tensions related to Greenland.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been indicated that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, which marks a significant improvement from the previous month's rate of 4.8%. This decline represents a total of 500,000 individuals who have found employment opportunities. Additionally, the report highlighted a notable increase in job creation, with 700,000 new jobs added to the economy in the past month. The current labor force participation rate stands at 62.3%, showcasing a steady increase from the previous rate of 61.8%. Overall, these statistics point towards a positive trend in the country's labor market, indicating potential growth and stability.

data.title: INVO Fertility (IVF) stock falls 14.78% to $2.02 after-hours, up 191.73% during regular sessions. Acquired Family Beginnings clinic for $750,000.
data.description: Healthcare company INVO Fertility Inc. (NASDAQ: IVF) saw its shares experience a significant fluctuation on Wednesday. After closing the regular trading session at $2.37, up 191.73%, the Florida-based company's stock dropped by 14.78% to $2.02 in after-hours trading on Tuesday. The reason behind this sudden movement remains unclear. It is worth noting that on January 15, INVO Fertility, formerly known as NAYA Biosciences, took part in the Lytham Partners 2026 Investor Healthcare Summit, where discussions on company performance and sector outlook were held. Furthermore, the company recently finalized an acquisition agreement with Family Beginnings, P.C., an Indiana-based fertility clinic, for a purchase price including $350,000 in cash payable at closing. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Investors poured $3.2B into Bitcoin in 9 days. This activity could indicate a positive long-term trend, per Santiment.
data.description: Santiment's crypto sentiment platform has noted a significant increase in Bitcoin purchases made by a specific group of holders. This uptick in buying activity suggests a possible "long-term bullish divergence" in the market.

data.title: Trump Media is edging closer to a unique shareholder token airdrop. Individual insiders hold 41% of shares, the public 32%, and institutions 23%.
data.description: According to a recent estimate by Simply Wall St, individual insiders hold 41% of shares in Trump Media, while the general public holds 32% and institutions hold 23%.

data.title: HistoIndex partners with Houston Research Institute to enhance MASH diagnostic services for chronic liver disease.
data.description: A recent development in Singapore on January 20, 2026, revealed that HistoIndex, an innovative company specializing in AI-powered digital pathology solutions for chronic liver disease, has forged a key partnership with the esteemed Houston Research Institute (HRI). This collaboration is significant as HRI is renowned for its expertise in executing clinical trials, enhancing the potential for groundbreaking advancements in the field. This marks a pivotal moment in the realm of liver disease research, leveraging cutting-edge technology and research capabilities.
